raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"Invite friends and family to join Ibotta and earn $10 for each referral.","distilled_fact":"Ibotta offers $10 for each referral when a user invites friends and family to join Ibotta."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"Link your store loyalty cards to Fetch Rewards to earn points automatically.","distilled_fact":"Fetch Rewards can automatically earn points when a user links store loyalty cards to Fetch Rewards."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"Scan your receipts from participating stores to earn points, even if you didn't buy anything with a specific offer.","distilled_fact":"Fetch Rewards awards points for scanning receipts from participating stores even when no purchase matches a specific offer."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"Invite friends and family to join Fetch Rewards and earn points for each referral.","distilled_fact":"Fetch Rewards offers points for each referral when a user invites friends and family to join Fetch Rewards."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app","confidence":0.81,"matched_text":"Use cashback portals like Rakuten (formerly known as Ebates) or TopCashback for online purchases to earn additional cashback.","distilled_fact":"Rakuten, formerly known as Ebates, and TopCashback can be used for online purchases to earn additional cashback."}]}
